title: Forward Deployed Engineer
jd_text: Globex is hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer to work directly with customers, turning their hardest problems into shipped software. You will scope solutions on-site, build prototypes fast, and bring them to production with our core teams. We look for engineers who are comfortable across the stack, communicate clearly with non-technical stakeholders, and own outcomes end to end. Bonus: experience automating analysis workflows, working with LLM tooling, or bridging simulation/data and product. This is a generic sample posting included with career-engine so you can run a dry-run end to end. Replace it with a real job you are applying to.
notes: Sample job shipped with the repo. Safe to dry-run against. Replace with a real posting.
